title: Watch-critter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Watch-critters''' were creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]].<ref name="CotJ">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
